summary: Operator-authorized v0.2 increment on the signed v0.1 slice: tool-tier progression (ore gated to tier 2, pick forged at the Town Hall from stockpile, tiers scale mining speed), food loop (berry bushes drop food, settlers eat 2/dawn, shortage feeds scarcity), per-tile light occlusion (blocks_light simulated via TileSet occluders + shadowed torch lights), and threat persistence in saves (v0.2 saves, v0.1 accepted). Smoke suite extended to 34 checks, all passing headless and windowed with reviewed screenshot.
scope: v0.2 features drawn from GAME_FEATURE_OUTLINE and documented v0.1 limitations; 'must not build yet' list untouched.
next_action: Operator playthrough of v0.2, then choose v0.3 scope from HANDOFF candidates.
